allow: Bash(node -e "const y = require\('yahoo-finance2'\).default; y.chart\('GC=F', { period1: new Date\(Date.now\(\) - 7*86400000\), interval: '1h' }\).then\(r => { console.log\('quotes:', r.quotes?.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.quotes?.[0], null, 2\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERR', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const Y = require\('yahoo-finance2'\).default; const yf = new Y\(\); yf.chart\('GC=F', { period1: new Date\(Date.now\(\) - 7*86400000\), interval: '1h' }\).then\(r => { console.log\('quotes count:', r.quotes?.length\); console.log\('first:', JSON.stringify\(r.quotes?.[0], null, 2\)\); console.log\('last:', JSON.stringify\(r.quotes?.[r.quotes.length-1], null, 2\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERR', e.message\)\)")
